name: policy-dashboard
description: Policy Dashboard — Vanilla JavaScript + Playwright E2E. Demonstrates JavaScript core concepts and automated UI testing.

scripts.concepts: node js-concepts/01-closures.js && node js-concepts/02-event-loop.js && node js-concepts/03-prototypal-inheritance.js && node js-concepts/04-var-let-const.js && node js-concepts/05-this-binding.js && node js-concepts/06-promise-all.js && node js-concepts/07-debounce-throttle.js && node js-concepts/08-event-emitter.js
